minimum_requirements: SCRIPTS directory or explicit non-script role

manual_owner_amendments.author: Owner via Logos-Prime manual PowerShell patch
manual_owner_amendments.summary: Adds rule that a complete organ requires a dedicated utility, and any utility must be backed by real scripts/reports/receipts/status.

organ_utility_rules.title: No complete organ without dedicated utility
organ_utility_rules.meaning: An organ cannot be considered complete, canon-candidate, or canon-ready unless it has a dedicated Owner-facing utility or workbench surface that exposes its scripts, reports, receipts, status, blockers, and allowed actions.
organ_utility_rules.owner_note_ru: Без личной утилиты орган не считается полноценным органом. На SCAFFOLD/BOOTSTRAP допускается отсутствие утилиты, но для CANON_CANDIDATE и CANON_V0_1 утилита обязательна.

organ_utility_rules.title: No decorative utility without scripts
organ_utility_rules.meaning: An organ utility must not be decorative. It must be backed by real organ scripts, reports, receipts, machine-readable status files, and evidence paths.
organ_utility_rules.owner_note_ru: Утилита не может строиться без скриптов органа. Сначала scripts/reports/receipts/status, потом utility, потом Sanctum-panel.
